title: Other AIs · Connectors
subtitle: Give any AI assistant direct access to your NeoSapien memories.

blocks.sub: Give any AI assistant direct access to your NeoSapien memories.

blocks.title: Sign in with the NeoSapien account
blocks.html:
Sign in with the NeoSapien account

(This can be different from your ChatGPT account)

blocks.title: If NeoSapien MCP doesn't work or appear in the chat, do one of these:
blocks.html:
• Add "from NeoSapien" to your message
  • Close the tab and reopen ChatGPT
  • Re-authenticate with the existing NeoSapien account
  • Remove the NeoSapien from connectors and add it again.

blocks.text: Here's what it does for you
blocks.sub: You ask, Neo 1 recalls, your AI does the work. Things you can do:

items.title: Draft your replies
items.desc: “Write the follow up email on what I owe Subodh”

items.title: Prep for what's next
items.desc: “Prep me for my meeting with Mohit, what did he ask last time?”

items.title: Recall any detail
items.desc: “What's the medicine I discussed for my father?”

items.title: Turn talk into to-dos
items.desc: “Make a task list from my last daily standup”

items.title: Work across your tools
items.desc: “Add those tasks to my Notion.” Your AI has both Neo 1 and your other apps.

items.title: Export data
items.desc: "Export all memories from yesterday as a CSV"
